creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pawel
Date: Fri Nov  6 18:35:27 UTC 2015
New revision: 400951
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/400951

Log:
  Linuxdoc-Tools is a fork of SGML-Tools 1.0.9, capable of processing
  LinuxDoc DTD SGML files. Such files are sometimes used as an input
  format for generated documentation.

  WWW: https://tracker.debian.org/pkg/linuxdoc-tools

  PR:		195478
  Submitted by:	Felix Palmen <felix@palmen-it.de>

Changes:
  head/textproc/Makefile
  head/textproc/linuxdoc-tools/
  head/textproc/linuxdoc-tools/Makefile
  head/textproc/linuxdoc-tools/distinfo
  head/textproc/linuxdoc-tools/files/
  head/textproc/linuxdoc-tools/files/patch-Makefile.in
  head/textproc/linuxdoc-tools/files/patch-rtf-fix_rtf2rtf.l
  head/textproc/linuxdoc-tools/pkg-descr
  head/textproc/linuxdoc-tools/pkg-plist
